In [1]:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Load the Pokémon data into a DataFrame
data = pd.read_csv('Data-Week4.csv')  

# 1. Visualization
# Create histograms, density plots, and box plots for numerical attributes

# List of numerical attributes
numerical_attributes = ['Total', 'HP', 'Attack', 'Defense', 'Sp. Atk', 'Sp. Def', 'Speed']

# Create subplots for visualizations
fig, axes = plt.subplots(nrows=3, ncols=3, figsize=(15, 12))
fig.suptitle('Pokémon Data Visualizations', fontsize=16)

for i, attribute in enumerate(numerical_attributes):
    row, col = i // 3, i % 3
    ax = axes[row, col]

    # Histogram
    sns.histplot(data=data, x=attribute, kde=True, ax=ax)
    ax.set_title(f'Histogram of {attribute}')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.subplots_adjust(top=0.9)

# Create density plots
plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))
plt.suptitle('Density Plots', fontsize=16)

for i, attribute in enumerate(numerical_attributes):
    plt.subplot(1, len(numerical_attributes), i + 1)
    sns.kdeplot(data=data, x=attribute, fill=True)
    plt.title(f'Density Plot of {attribute}')

plt.tight_layout()

# Create box plots
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
plt.title('Box Plots of Numerical Attributes', fontsize=16)
sns.boxplot(data=data[numerical_attributes], orient='h')
plt.xlabel('Value')
plt.show()

# 2. Feature Selection
# Create correlation matrix and scatter plots

# Calculate correlation matrix
correlation_matrix = data[numerical_attributes].corr()

# Create a heatmap for the correlation matrix
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
plt.title('Correlation Matrix', fontsize=16)
sns.heatmap(correlation_matrix, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt=".2f", square=True)
plt.show()

# Create scatter plots for selected pairs of attributes
scatter_attributes = [('Attack', 'Defense'), ('Sp. Atk', 'Sp. Def'), ('Speed', 'HP')]

for attribute_pair in scatter_attributes:
    plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
    plt.title(f'Scatter Plot: {attribute_pair[0]} vs {attribute_pair[1]}', fontsize=16)
    sns.scatterplot(data=data, x=attribute_pair[0], y=attribute_pair[1])
    plt.xlabel(attribute_pair[0])
    plt.ylabel(attribute_pair[1])
    plt.grid(True)

plt.show()
